content.en:
A year has passed.

The Dao Ancestors of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm who were willing to come to the war basically came to the bases, and the three half-step domain ancestors of the three Nine Heavens forces, the Eternal Dao Ancestors and the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestors of the Black Wind Mountain all came to participate in the battle.

As for the Heavenly Emperor Palace, this time only the Qinglong Palace Lord and the True Martial Palace Lord were sent, and the White Tiger Palace Lord sat in the Heavenly Emperor Palace and did not participate in the war.

this day.

The major bases announced the war against the Forbidden Zerg, and each Dao Ancestor either acted alone, or joined forces, or sat in the form of a legion, and they were ready one by one.

Before leaving, Ye Tian told Ye Xingchen, Ye Xingyue and Ye Yu.

"The three of you act together, don't go alone, understand? If there is danger, call for help as soon as possible, if the Supreme Dao Ancestor and the Invincible Dao Ancestor of Black Wind Mountain are nearby, they will go to the rescue of you. Remember, don't be strong!"

Ye Tian admonished.

"Yes, Father!"

Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue nodded again and again.

"Brother, I know!" Ye Yu also followed.

Ye Xingchen, Ye Xingyue and Ye Yu teamed up to hunt the Forbidden Zerg, while Ye Tian personally took his wife Xiao Yue to hunt the Forbidden Zerg.

As for the copying body, the Nine Extremes Heavenly King had already followed the Eternal Dao Ancestor and the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor to the Forbidden Zerg Lair at this moment.

......

The Eternal Dao Ancestor and the Divine Ruin Dao Ancestor were temporary actions, and they did not inform the Qinglong Palace Lord of these half-step domain ancestors, although there were only two half-step domain ancestors, it was difficult to resist the six lord-level forbidden zergs.

However, the six lord-level forbidden zergs have not always guarded the entrance of the forbidden zerg's lair, usually only two lord-level guards, and the other four lord-level have gone to other areas to find resources.

After all, the lord-level forbidden zerg also needs to improve their strength, and they don't rely on cultivation, they just devour resources to strengthen themselves.

Moreover, the lord-level Forbidden Zerg also need to find a large number of resources to supply the Forbidden Zerg nest in order to breed more Forbidden Zerg, so they also have a heavy task.

The purpose of the Eternal Dao Ancestor and the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor was very simple, that is, to attract the two lord-level forbidden zergs who were guarding, but to take the opportunity to let the Nine Extremes Heavenly King enter the inside of the forbidden zerg lair.

With the strength of the Nine Extremes Heavenly King, even if he encounters an elite-level taboo zerg, he will not be killed immediately, unless he encounters a commander-level taboo zerg, he will be killed by a few moves.

But even so, the Nine Extremes Heavenly King was enough to spy on a little information.

Along.

Ye Tian saw a lot of forbidden zergs, and it seemed that the forbidden zergs also knew that the Dao Ancestors in the Dao Mountain Realm had been killed, so they were gathering the Zerg army to prepare for war with the Dao Ancestors.

Although the Eternal Dao Ancestor and the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor could easily kill these forbidden zergs, they didn't make a move, otherwise once they attracted the lord-level forbidden zergs, then this time the plan would fail.

The speed of the two half-step domain ancestors was very fast, and Ye Tian was carried by the two of them throughout the whole process.

It was about an hour before they finally arrived at the Forbidden Zerg Lair.

"What a big lair!"

Ye Tian secretly exclaimed.

This is a spherical nest, and the passages are connected to the inside of the nest, and at this time, you can see the forbidden zerg entering and exiting from these passages, which are entrances and exits.

According to Ye Tian's estimation, this lair is at least as big as the territory of the human race, and you can imagine how huge the territory is, comparable to the size of a Dao realm!

Outside the lair, two forbidden zergs that exuded a golden luster were crawling, and the aura exuded from their bodies far surpassed that of other forbidden zergs, and even gave Ye Tian a great coercion in the distance.

The Forbidden Zerg will not restrain their aura, so these two lord-level Forbidden Zerg who are comparable to the Half-Step Domain Ancestor are completely releasing the coercion of the Half-Step Domain Ancestor, you can imagine how terrifying it is!

If Ye Tian approached these two lord-level forbidden zergs, I am afraid that before he could get close, he would be suppressed by the coercion on their bodies and could not move.

"Nine Extremes Heavenly King, we attract those two lord-level forbidden zergs, you take the opportunity to find a passage to rush into the forbidden zerg lair, remember, we only give you ten minutes, no matter whether you fall or not after ten minutes, we will leave!"

Eternal Dao Ancestral Dao.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian also knew very well that the Eternal Dao Ancestor and the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor were only two half-step domain ancestors, and the Forbidden Zerg had at least six lord levels, and their strength was not equal, if the other four lord levels of the Forbidden Zerg came back, even more lord levels would suddenly pop up.

Then, if the Eternal Dao Ancestor and the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor did not evacuate, there was really a danger of falling.

Bang!!!!

The Eternal Dao Ancestor and the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor made a move, and the two attacks bombarded the two lord-level forbidden zergs.

Oh!!!

The lord-level forbidden zerg was angered by the attack, and their golden eyes saw the Eternal Dao Ancestor and the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor through the layers of void, and recognized their identities as the half-step domain ancestor who attacked them last time.

Suddenly, the two-headed lord-level forbidden zerg became even angrier and killed them directly.

As for Ye Tian, I'm sorry, they didn't care much at all, because Ye Tian was too weak, like an ant.

The Eternal Dao Ancestor and the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor performed the Forbidden Dao Technique, showing a terrifying forbidden body and fighting with the lord-level forbidden Zerg, their battle was extremely terrifying, and every aftermath was enough to shock the six or seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors.

The Dark Forbidden Void in this area showed signs of cracking, which showed how terrifying their attacks were.

Ye Tian stayed away from their battle and prepared to infiltrate the inside of the Forbidden Zerg lair from the other direction.

"That's it!"

Ye Tian spotted a passage, cast the Heavenly Illusion Divine Step, a great thousand dao technique, and rushed over at the fastest speed.

Soon, he entered the passage and continued to move forward in the tide.

Before he could fly, Ye Tian sensed the existence of a forbidden zerg through his copying talent, and it was about to leave through this passage.

Simply what's more, this is just an ordinary forbidden Zerg, which is about equivalent to the strength of the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and its strength is very weak.

After Ye Tian approached the other party, he instantly struck out and killed the opponent in one blow with the Ancient Slashing Technique.

After killing this forbidden zerg, Ye Tian put away his corpse, after all, the forbidden zerg can be sacrificed to the origin of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and it can be exchanged for great benefits, so every corpse of the forbidden zerg is precious.

Next, Ye Tian was lucky, there was no forbidden zerg to pass through this passage, but Ye Tian knew very well that once he entered the inside of the forbidden zerg's lair, he would definitely still be exposed.
